metadata.title: Servicios | Language Assurance en español, Localización e Inteligencia Cultural | Xpandia
metadata.description: Conoce los servicios de Xpandia: Language Assurance en español, Localización y Adaptación, e Inteligencia Cultural Aplicada para equipos de IA, SaaS, EdTech y producto digital.
metadata.ogTitle: Servicios de Xpandia | Expertise en español para equipos de IA, SaaS, EdTech y producto digital
metadata.ogDescription: Valida, localiza y adapta culturalmente experiencias en español para audiencias hispanas e hispanohablantes.

hero.headline: El expertise en español que tu producto necesita.
hero.subheadline: Xpandia helps teams validate, improve, and culturally adapt high-impact Spanish experiences across AI outputs, product flows, support content, marketing, and customer journeys.
hero.supportingLine: Built for AI, SaaS, EdTech, Product, Localization, CX, and Marketing teams serving Hispanic and Spanish-speaking audiences.

decision.headline: ¿Qué necesita resolver tu equipo?
decision.intro: Parte del resultado que tu equipo necesita. Xpandia estructura cada proyecto en torno a una pregunta de negocio clara: ¿tu español está listo, necesita repararse o adaptarse, o tu equipo necesita una comprensión cultural más profunda?

cards.title: ¿Necesitas saber si tu español está listo?
cards.body: Para equipos que ya tienen respuestas de IA, flujos de producto, contenido de soporte o experiencias localizadas en español y necesitan validación experta antes de lanzar, escalar o publicar.
bestWhen: Evaluar respuestas de IA en español.
Auditar un producto o recorrido de cliente en español.
Identificar riesgos de calidad antes del despliegue.
Priorizar correcciones por severidad e impacto de negocio.
Crear estándares para la calidad continua del español.

cards.title: Need to repair or improve Spanish content?
cards.body: For teams with Spanish content, product copy, support content, marketing, documentation, or customer-facing experiences that need to feel clearer, more natural, more consistent, and more audience-ready.
bestWhen: Repair translated, inconsistent, or underperforming Spanish.
Adapt product, support, or marketing copy for real users.
Align terminology, tone, and regional Spanish.
Prepare Spanish assets for QA, launch, or publication.

cards.title: Need to understand your audience beyond language?
cards.body: For teams that need cultural insight, messaging guidance, market readiness, training, and strategic direction to connect with Hispanic and Spanish-speaking audiences.
bestWhen: Understand cultural expectations and trust signals.
Identify cultural friction before it affects adoption or conversion.
Make better product, content, CX, and go-to-market decisions.

startingPoints.headline: Focused engagements designed to create momentum.
startingPoints.intro: Start with a clear scope, expert human review, practical deliverables, and recommendations your team can act on quickly.

cards.name: AI Spanish Quality Audit Sprint
cards.bestFor: Teams with AI outputs, chatbot responses, tutors, copilots, agents, or automated support flows operating in Spanish.
cards.outcome: Understand quality risks, scoring, issue patterns, and readiness before users rely on the experience.

cards.name: Spanish Launch Readiness Audit
cards.bestFor: Teams launching or preparing a Spanish website, app, onboarding flow, support journey, AI experience, or customer-facing product surface.
cards.outcome: Identify what affects clarity, trust, UX, cultural fit, conversion, and readiness before launch or relaunch.

cards.name: Spanish Experience Repair
cards.bestFor: Teams with existing Spanish content that sounds translated, inconsistent, unclear, generic, too literal, or not ready for real users.
cards.outcome: Turn underperforming Spanish into content that feels clear, natural, trustworthy, and aligned with your product, audience, and business goal.

cards.name: ACI Talk / Executive Briefing
cards.bestFor: Leadership, Product, Marketing, CX, Localization, People, and Global Operations teams working across cultures, markets, languages, or international teams.
cards.outcome: Help your team understand how culture shapes trust, communication, feedback, decision-making, market readiness, and audience expectations.
deliverables: 45–60 minute live talk or executive briefing.
Pre-call to understand audience and business context.
Real business examples tailored to your audience.

cards.name: Hispanic Audience & Messaging Review
cards.bestFor: Marketing, Growth, Product Marketing, CX, Localization, and leadership teams adapting messages for Hispanic, LatAm, US Hispanic, or Spanish-speaking audiences.
cards.outcome: Identify whether your message is clear, credible, culturally aligned, persuasive, and built around the trust signals your audience needs.

cards.name: Spanish Quality Advisory
cards.bestFor: Teams that need ongoing senior Spanish quality judgment, review workflows, QA standards, vendor/reviewer alignment, terminology guidance, or recurring quality decisions.
cards.outcome: Build a practical Spanish quality system your team can use to make better decisions, reduce review friction, and scale quality with confidence.

comparison.headline: The difference is simple: validate, repair, or understand.
comparison.intro: Many teams start with an audit, then move into repair, retesting, sign-off, cultural insight, or ongoing advisory. Xpandia can support a focused need or help build a broader Spanish quality roadmap.

rows.need: Know whether Spanish AI outputs, product flows, or support content are ready to ship
Improve Spanish content that exists but does not feel natural, clear, or audience-ready
rows.outcome: Spanish content built for real users

rows.need: Understand Hispanic/LatAm audiences, cultural expectations, trust, and market fit
Build repeatable standards and ongoing quality support

engagementModel.headline: Alcance claro. Revisión experta. Resultado accionable.

steps.title: Definir la necesidad
steps.body: Definimos tu audiencia, la variante del español, la superficie de producto, el tipo de contenido, el objetivo de negocio, el plazo y el resultado esperado.

steps.title: Revisar la experiencia
steps.body: Evaluamos o adaptamos el material seleccionado con criterio humano experto y la combinación adecuada de señales de calidad lingüística, cultural, de UX y de producto.

steps.title: Entregar la evidencia
steps.body: Recibes hallazgos listos para decidir que tu equipo puede usar de inmediato: tableros de calidad, ejemplos anotados, registros de incidencias, clasificaciones de severidad, recomendaciones priorizadas, reescrituras, estándares o materiales de formación.

steps.title: Decidir el siguiente paso
steps.body: Recomendamos el siguiente paso adecuado: publicar, corregir, retestear, localizar, adaptar, formar, gobernar o escalar.

finalCta.headline: Identifiquemos el camino de calidad en español adecuado para tu equipo.
finalCta.body: Cuéntanos qué está construyendo, lanzando, localizando, validando o mejorando tu equipo. Te recomendaremos el proyecto adecuado según tu producto, tu audiencia, tu plazo y tu objetivo de negocio.
